get.description:
Begin a PKCE-protected Authorization Code flow.

Sets a short-lived ``seizu_oauth_state`` cookie carrying the PKCE
verifier, the OAuth ``state`` value, and the validated ``return_to`` URL.
Returns the IDP's authorize URL; the SPA top-level-navigates to it.

post.description:
Exchange the cookie's refresh token for a new access token.

Re-issues the session cookie with a rolling Max-Age. Returns 401 (and
clears the cookie) if the cookie is invalid or the IDP rejects the
refresh token — that's the path where the user is logged out and must
re-authenticate.

Drop the session cookie and (optionally) revoke the IDP refresh token.

Always succeeds from the user's perspective. Best-effort IDP logout
failures are logged but never block the local logout.

get.description:
Return node labels, relationship types, property keys, and indexes.

Runs fixed introspection queries without saving to query history.
Requires query:execute permission (same as the ad-hoc query console).
Return the current authenticated user's profile and resolved permissions.

post.description: Execute a validated read-only ad-hoc Cypher query.
Execute a validated read-only Cypher query authorized by a signed report token.
Re-execute a query by history ID without creating a new history entry.

get.description:
Return the authenticated user's query history, paginated newest-first.

History is strictly scoped to the calling user — other users' history is
never returned.
Return a single query history item by ID, scoped to the current user.
List all reports.
Return the latest version of the dashboard report.

put.description: Set a report as the default dashboard.

get.description: Return the latest version of a report.

delete.description: Delete a report and all its versions.

get.description: List all versions of a report.

post.description: Save a new version of a report.

get.description: Return a specific version of a report.

put.description: Update report visibility without creating a report version.

post.description: Clone a report into a new report with the given name.

get.description: Return the built-in role definitions (seizu-viewer, seizu-editor, seizu-admin).
List all user-defined roles.
Return a user-defined role by ID.

put.description: Update a user-defined role (creates a new version).

delete.description: Delete a user-defined role and all its versions.

get.description: List all versions of a user-defined role.
Return a specific version of a user-defined role.
List all scheduled queries.
Return a scheduled query by ID.

post.description:
Request an immediate run of a scheduled query.

The worker picks the request up on its next poll and runs the query even
if it is disabled (so it can be tested before enabling).

get.description: List all versions of a scheduled query.
Return a specific version of a scheduled query.
Return the distinct SyncMetadata grouptype/syncedtype/groupid values.
List all toolsets (built-ins first, then user-defined).
Return a toolset by ID.

put.description: Update a toolset (creates a new version).

delete.description: Delete a toolset and all its tools.

get.description: List all versions of a toolset.
Return a specific version of a toolset.
List all tools in a toolset.

post.description: Create a new tool within a toolset.

get.description: Return a tool by ID.

put.description: Update a tool (creates a new version).

post.description: Execute a tool's Cypher query with the provided arguments.

get.description: List all versions of a tool.
Return a specific version of a tool.
Return a user profile by internal user_id.

post.description: Validate a Cypher query without executing it.
Stream a chat response as an AI SDK UI Message Stream.

get.description:
Return the persisted messages for the caller's chat thread.

Lets the SPA rehydrate a conversation after a reload, since the client-side
message state is otherwise lost.
Return all chat sessions for the current user, newest first.

post.description: Create a new chat session and return it.

get.description: Return one chat session for the current user.

List scheduled chats.

Defaults to the requesting user's own schedules. With
``chat:schedule:read_all``, ``all=true`` lists every user's schedules and
``user_id`` filters to a specific owner.

post.description: Create a scheduled chat owned by the requesting user.

get.description: Return a scheduled chat (own, or any with chat:schedule:read_all).

put.description: Update one of the requesting user's scheduled chats.

delete.description: Delete one of the requesting user's scheduled chats.

get.description: List the run sessions a scheduled chat has produced, newest first.

Return the read-only transcript of one of a schedule's run sessions.

Unlike ``GET /api/v1/chat/history`` (which reads the caller's own
threads), this resolves the thread under the schedule owner's namespace so
holders of ``chat:schedule:read_all`` can review other users' runs.

post.description:
Request an immediate run of one of the requesting user's scheduled chats.

The worker picks the request up on its next poll and runs the schedule
(as its owner) even if it is disabled, so it can be tested before
enabling.

get.description: Return version history for a scheduled chat (own, or any with chat:schedule:read_all).
Return a specific version of a scheduled chat (own, or any with chat:schedule:read_all).

arguments.title: Arguments
arguments.description: Arguments shown to the user. These must not contain secrets or highly sensitive data.

ActionConfirmationPublic.title: ActionConfirmationPublic
ActionConfirmationPublic.description: Redacted confirmation record safe to send to browser clients.

ChatScheduleSpec.title: ChatScheduleSpec
ChatScheduleSpec.description:
When a scheduled chat runs: a ``ScheduleSpec`` limited to hourly
granularity (no ``interval`` type and no minute-of-hour offset).

LoginResponse.title: LoginResponse

QueryHistoryListResponse.title: QueryHistoryListResponse

RefreshResponse.title: RefreshResponse
RefreshResponse.description: Body returned by POST /api/v1/auth/refresh — new short-lived access token.

RenderSkillRequest.title: RenderSkillRequest
RenderSkillRequest.description: Request body for rendering a skill template.

ReportListItem.title: ReportListItem
ReportListItem.description: Lightweight summary of a report for list views.

RoleItem.title: RoleItem
RoleItem.description: A user-defined role stored in the database.

RoleVersion.title: RoleVersion
RoleVersion.description: A single version snapshot of a user-defined role.

ScheduleSpec.title: ScheduleSpec
ScheduleSpec.description:
A structured time-based schedule. All times are UTC.

- ``interval``: every ``interval_minutes`` minutes, anchored to the last
  run (a new schedule runs immediately).
- ``hourly``: every ``interval_hours`` hours, anchored to the last run
  (a new schedule runs immediately).
- ``daily``: on the selected ``days_of_week`` (0=Monday..6=Sunday) at
  ``hour``:``minute``.
- ``monthly``: on the selected ``days_of_month`` (1-31) at
  ``hour``:``minute`` (default 00:00). A day a month doesn't have runs on
  that month's last day instead (e.g. 31 in April runs on the 30th).

ScheduledChatItem.title: ScheduledChatItem
ScheduledChatItem.description:
A scheduled chat record: a recurring headless agent run owned by a user.

The worker runs the prompt as the owner; each run creates a regular chat
session in the owner's session list.

ScheduledChatRunRequestedResponse.title: ScheduledChatRunRequestedResponse
ScheduledChatRunRequestedResponse.description: Acknowledgement that a manual run was requested.

ScheduledChatVersion.title: ScheduledChatVersion
ScheduledChatVersion.description: A point-in-time snapshot of a scheduled chat's configuration.

ScheduledQueryItem.description: A scheduled query record stored in the database.

ScheduledQueryRunRequestedResponse.title: ScheduledQueryRunRequestedResponse
ScheduledQueryRunRequestedResponse.description: Acknowledgement that a manual run was requested.

ScheduledQueryVersion.title: ScheduledQueryVersion
ScheduledQueryVersion.description: A point-in-time snapshot of a scheduled query's configuration.
